mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced household income, which suppresses corporate earnings expectations and drives negative equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy falls below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, which accelerates corporate revenue growth and produces positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform single-series signals with statistical significance (p < 0.05) in out-of-sample testing, or Rank IC turns negative.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth that outpaces monetary tightening indicates resilient manufacturing capacity and supply chain efficiency, supporting short-term equity rallies despite higher borrowing costs.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during tightening periods, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical difference from zero (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate profit margins and triggers expectations for aggressive central bank rate hikes, generating negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes correlate with positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of historical cases, or the signal loses predictive power during high-inflation regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust job creation and improving labor utilization, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing, or the combined signal underperforms a simple average of individual series.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases aggregate corporate earnings expectations and improves equity risk premiums, producing positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns show no significant correlation with GDP growth changes.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal supply chain contraction and impending earnings downgrades, causing short-term equity sell-offs as investors price in reduced output.
failure_condition: Negative signal fails to predict returns with accuracy above 55% in backtests, or 5-day forward returns remain positive in over 60% of triggered cases.
